generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gear transmission for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current measurement data from motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control"
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance MATLAB_SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming between physical and virtual"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetRepresentationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for visualization of friction analysis data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisDashboardService
]

instance SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance Simulink_CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLAB_SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 first axis digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "SysML structural modeling for system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelInsight
]

instance AssetRepresentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell digital representation service"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetRepresentationInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT-based real-time data streaming service"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance FrictionAnalysisDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionParameterInsight, KineticFrictionParameterInsight, ViscousFrictionParameterInsight, EnhancedRobotControlAction
]

instance SysMLModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model insights from SysML diagrams"
]

instance AssetRepresentationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Digital representation via Asset Administration Shell"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data availability from physical sensors"
]

instance FrictionAnalysisVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of friction analysis data in dashboard"
]

instance StaticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Static friction parameter identification for joint"
]

instance KineticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Kinetic friction parameter identification for joint"
]

instance ViscousFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Viscous friction parameter identification for joint"
]

instance EnhancedRobotControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enhancing robot control algorithms using friction parameters for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT; specific update rates not specified in document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, real-time sensor data via MQTT, and visualization dashboard for friction analysis and motion control improvement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; continuous monitoring during robot operation for wear and application changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured reference values; specific verification metrics and uncertainty quantification not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML modeling standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety cell restricts working range to [-90°, 90°], but no DT-specific cybersecurity or safety protocols detailed."
]
